description_short: Fort Myers is on Florida's southwest Gulf Coast and one of the most storm-surge-vulnerable cities in the United States, hit directly by Hurricane Ian in 2022.
description_long: Located along the Caloosahatchee River near the Gulf of Mexico, Fort Myers and surrounding Lee County face severe hurricane and storm-surge risk from June through November. The shallow coastline and barrier islands amplify surge during major storms. Lee County is served by NWS Tampa Bay Area (office code TBW) within forecast zone FLZ265 (Coastal Lee).
